As part of a series of Stand Up Strikes, on September 15, 2023, 12,700 workers at 3 Big Three plants (1 Stellantis, 1 Ford, 1 GM) went on strike. On September 22, 2023, 5,600 workers at 38 parts distribution locations (18 GM & 20 Stellantis) joined the strike. We only list 6 of the 38 new locations that joined the strike;  see Source 5 for the full list. On September 29, 2023, 6,900 workers at 1 Ford and 1 GM plant joined the strike. On October 11, 2023, 8,700 workers at 1 Ford plant joined the strike. On October 23, 2023, 6,800 workers at 1 Stellantis plant joined the strike. On October 24, 2023, 5,000 workers at 1 GM plant joined the strike. On October 25, 2023, the UAW and Ford reached a tentative agreement and all striking Ford workers ended their strike. On October 28, 2023, the UAW and Stellantis reached a tentative agreement and all striking Stellantis workers ended their strike. On October 28, 2023, 4,000 workers at 1 GM plant joined the strike. On October 30, 2023, the UAW and General Motors reached a tentative agreement and all striking General Motors workers ended their strike.

laborActions.notes: As part of a series of Stand Up Strikes, on September 15, 2023, 12,700 workers at 3 Big Three plants (1 Stellantis, 1 Ford, 1 GM) went on strike. On September 22, 2023, 5,600 workers at 38 parts distribution locations (18 GM & 20 Stellantis) joined the strike. We only list 6 of the 38 new locations that joined the strike;  see Source 5 for the full list. On September 29, 2023, 6,900 workers at 1 Ford and 1 GM plant joined the strike. On October 11, 2023, 8,700 workers at 1 Ford plant joined the strike. On October 23, 2023, 6,800 workers at 1 Stellantis plant joined the strike. On October 24, 2023, 5,000 workers at 1 GM plant joined the strike. On October 25, 2023, the UAW and Ford reached a tentative agreement and all striking Ford workers ended their strike. On October 28, 2023, the UAW and Stellantis reached a tentative agreement and all striking Stellantis workers ended their strike. On October 28, 2023, 4,000 workers at 1 GM plant joined the strike. On October 30, 2023, the UAW and General Motors reached a tentative agreement and all striking General Motors workers ended their strike.
This protest took place at three locations. We list all the three locations of the protest.
